fields.title: Migrate storage layer from .md to .jsonl
fields.description:
Update curated-memory.ts service to use JSONL format instead of markdown.

Acceptance criteria:
- Read/write JSONL files instead of .md with § delimiters
- File extension changed to .jsonl
- Atomic write operations preserved
- File locking preserved
- Migration: auto-convert existing .md files on first read
fields.notes: Implemented JSONL storage in curated-memory: .jsonl paths, JSONL read/write via MemoryEntry helpers, first-read .md migration under lock with atomic write, preserved frozen snapshot behavior, and updated runtime/service tests.
fields.close_reason: Done: curated-memory now stores memory in JSONL with locked first-read migration from legacy markdown and gate passing.
